Your Current Portfolio Allocation

Enter your holdings to see your allocation across Equities, Bonds, and International

Investing can sometimes feel complicated, but it doesn't have to be. Many investors hold a variety of funds spread across different asset classes. When viewed more broadly, however, these allocations can often be grouped into three main categories: Equities, Bonds, and International investments.

This tool allows you to enter your current allocation and see how it maps to these broad asset class groupings. Looking at your portfolio in this simplified way can make it easier to understand your overall investment mix and compare it with hypothetical alternatives using the Simple Portfolio Analyzer.

This tool is for informational and educational purposes only. It does not constitute investment advice, and WavRyder does not receive, store, or transmit any information you enter. All processing occurs entirely in your browser. Please consult a qualified financial advisor before making investment decisions.

Your Privacy: This is a self-directed, client-side tool. Your financial data never leaves your browser and is not stored, transmitted, or seen by WavRyder.

Note: Fund classifications are based on industry-standard categories and verified against current fund data. Classifications are approximate and may not precisely reflect every fund's underlying holdings. If a fund appears misclassified, click the asset class pill to override it. If a symbol is not found in our database of 15,000+ funds or via live lookup, you can manually assign it to an asset class. Data is for informational purposes only.

Auto-Refresh Names & Classifications

⚡ Fast Name Refresh — 1 Yahoo call per ticker, names only, ~30 min for all 15K. Full Refresh — 3 calls per ticker, updates names + classifications, ~1.5 hrs. Both auto-save progress every 500 tickers.
